title: AWCMS-Mini idn_admin_regions vendored dataset manifest
description: Describes the shape of data/idn-admin-regions/manifest.json — the provenance record for third-party files vendored from cahyadsn/wilayah (Issue #656, epic #654). One manifest.json is committed at the dataset root; it is hand-maintained until Issue #660's import pipeline reads it, and Issue #659's validation gate is expected to validate manifest.json against this schema.

$schema.description: Relative path back to this schema file, for editor tooling.

datasetCode.description: Stable dataset identifier. Matches the idn_admin_regions module key (src/modules/idn-admin-regions/module.ts) and is expected to match the dataset_code column Issue #657's schema introduces.

moduleKey.description: The AWCMS-Mini module key this dataset belongs to (src/modules/index.ts listModules()).

repository.description: Upstream GitHub repository URL. Must be preserved verbatim per Issue #656's rules.

sourcePath.description: Upstream folder the vendored files were sourced from.

branch.description: Upstream branch the commit SHA below was resolved from.

commit.description: Full 40-character upstream git commit SHA that was imported.

commitDate.description: Upstream commit's own author/committer date, as recorded by `git log`, in its original timezone offset.

license.description: Upstream repository's license identifier (SPDX-style short name).

licenseFile.description: Path, relative to this manifest's directory, to the verbatim upstream LICENSE file.

importedAt.description: UTC timestamp (ISO 8601, Z-suffixed) when this import was performed.

officialReferenceCaveat.description: Must match IDN_ADMIN_REGIONS_OFFICIAL_REFERENCE_CAVEAT in src/modules/idn-admin-regions/domain/source-provenance.ts verbatim — this dataset is a third-party community package, not an official Kemendagri publication.

files.description: Raw upstream files vendored verbatim under upstream/cahyadsn-wilayah/. Never hand-edited (Issue #656 rule).

sha256.description: SHA-256 checksum of the file's exact committed bytes (see the data/idn-admin-regions/upstream/** binary .gitattributes rule that prevents line-ending normalization from invalidating this).

role.description: What kind of vendored artifact this file is.

normalizedFiles.description: Generated/normalized derivatives of the raw files above, stored separately under data/idn-admin-regions/normalized/ per Issue #656's rule ('if normalized files are generated, store them separately'). Empty as of Issue #656 — Issue #658 introduces the parser/normalizer that will populate this array and the normalized/ directory.

path.description: Path relative to data/idn-admin-regions/, expected to start with normalized/.

generatedFrom.description: Paths (relative to data/idn-admin-regions/) of the raw file(s) this normalized file was derived from.

notes.description: Free-text notes about scoping decisions (e.g. upstream files intentionally not vendored).
